## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Packaging/release
- [ ] Refactor

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run frontend:build`
- [ ] `npm run check:rust`
- [ ] Tested in `npm run tauri:dev`
- [ ] Tested packaged build or release artifact
- [ ] Not applicable

## Notes

Mention affected areas such as web platforms, projectM, native audio, plugins, AUR packaging, or translations.
